info.name: Syncboard API
info.description: Postman collection generated from Syncboard OpenAPI v3 spec

item.name: Log out user and invalidate current session token
Get a system configuration parameter by its unique key
Update an existing system configuration value by its key
Create a new system configuration parameter

Move a card to a different list or position
Get all cards in a list
Reassign a card to a different user

Get all lists in a board
Get all outstanding invitations from a workspace

Submit a new contact or support message
Update the processing status of a talk
Get a talk record by ID
Get talks filtered by issue ID
Get talks filtered by submitter email
Get all comments for a card
Add a comment to a card
Remove a member from a board
Renew expired access token using a valid refresh token
Mark a specific notification as read
Get unread notifications for authenticated user
Get activity logs for a board
